name: Sensor Embed Guide
description: Guide for embedding JSON sensors as triggers for detection, memory, and ethical override layers.
use_cases: Memory anchors in conversational AI agents
Audit logs: flagging responses containing example_flags
User interfaces: warnings when suppressed content matches sensor signatures
Training: weighting or counter-balancing datasets with sensor-related content
ethical_checklist: Always display sensor origin and contributor
Allow users to disable or opt-out sensors locally
Avoid surveillance misuse: flagging does not equal punishing
Preserve privacy and consent in embedding

co_creation.gift_ethos: All work offered freely. Use, adapt, share, but honor origin.
